lessonSubtitleText: Test how well you know this story

questions.text: What kingdom did Jesus talk about when He was on earth?
What are the four soils in Jesus’ parable?
answers: The path, rocky, thorny, and good soil

questions.text: What does the seed represent in the parable?
answers: The good news of God’s kingdom

questions.text: What do the different soils represent?
answers: Different kinds of people who hear the good news
Different types of land in Israel

questions.text: In Jesus' parable, which soil produced a crop?
What is the main lesson of the parable of the soils?
answers: If we truly believe, our lives will show good fruit
Be careful where you plant your seeds

questions.text: What kind of 'fruit' does a believer grow?
answers: The fruit of the Spirit (love, joy, peace, and more)

questions.text: In Jesus' parable, what did the men do when they found treasure or a valuable pearl?
answers: They sold everything to buy it
They tried to buy it at a cheap price

questions.text: What do the treasure and pearl represent?
What is the main lesson of the treasure and pearl parables?
answers: God’s kingdom is worth giving up everything for
Be careful where you hide your treasure
